summary: Excellent Owsley‑mixed soundboard capture with a killer Shakedown Street and top‑notch audio fidelity.
review: Reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear Owsley mix on this soundboard recording, calling it some of the finest Warfield/Radio City material available. While no specific performance details are given, the unanimous five‑star praise indicates a highly satisfying listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews award 5 stars and consistently highlight superb recording quality; with no negative comments, the rating leans toward near‑perfect despite limited show detail.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Praised for its Owsley mix and "finest sound" of Warfield/Radio City shows; clear, crisp, and high‑fidelity playback.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or performance quality were provided.
